text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look, I know you became cheer captain because you want to support
Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What? I never said that! A f-f-f-first-rate cheer captain would never
show such bias to just one competitor!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're not fooling me. And you won't fool the others for long,
either. ...But we can see how hard you're working to be a great leader.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And it's because you're working so hard that I want to tell you
something. A secret just between the two of us.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean this is an embarrassing story about me! You see, the reason I
wanted to join the Cheer Squad this year is...

text_block_list.name: Fishmonger
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Natie and... is this the cheer captain you told us about? I
hear you're both giving the Cheer Squad your all. I'm cheering for
you!

text_block_list.name: Bar Owner
text_block_list.text:
Cheering for the Cheer Squad... isn't that a funny thought! Hehe. Oh,
how about some juice for the road? Here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha. Thanks, both of you.

text_block_list.name: Bar Owner
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it! All of us here are on your cheer squad, Natie! You
can do it! Woo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Cheer squad?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha... Well, they don't have any uniforms or musical instruments...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But this "cheer squad" here is the reason why I wanted to join the
Tracen Cheer Squad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I had this goal I knew was beyond me, but I still didn't want to give
up. I found out what it was like to get up on the wrong stage.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
When I looked around, I realized how big the stage was. That's when
regret finally sank in. I felt frozen in place.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My hands even started shaking, but then...

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Folks
text_block_list.text: Natie! We believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A wave of encouraging cheers washed over me, pushing me forward.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They make the best cheer squad, the people here. They're so good at
it, they made me want to cheer for others and pass on the
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So since we're here, why don't you get a few tips from an experienced
cheer squad? They might just teach you something useful!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So that's why you brought me here...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And now I'll pass the floor to the folks here! ...Don't look at me like
that. I'm not used to these kinds of talks, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Greengrocer
text_block_list.text:
Hm... the secret to supporting others? Let's see... I'd say it's sincerity
that matters. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Butcher
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I know! If you both need help, this calls for a strategy meeting!
Gather round, guys!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wha? N-no need for a meeting. I was just looking for a few tips.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Are we putting our heads together? Then I'll go and get
some coffee going...

text_block_list.name: Tofu Maker
text_block_list.text: Oh, nice! We'd love some of your coffee! All right, let's do this, folks!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So this is Nature's cheer squad.

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Excuse the noise we're making at this time of night. When it
comes to Natie, we can't help but get worked up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Oh. No, I was just thinking how your voices were in unison like a real
squad.

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Really? I'm glad you think so. That's the one thing our shopping street
has going for it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Does anyone lead your group? Have you ever organized something
special to support Nature?

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I can't say we have. We don't have a leader, and we've never
prepared anything extravagant either.

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
We just got to chatting, leaned on each other, and since we all
wanted to support Natie, our voices came together naturally.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...
You just got to chatting... and leaned on each other? That's all?

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Sorry to state the obvious. I'm sure you already knew that, as
cheer captain.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...No, you've given me a much needed reminder.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, King? Did you get any good advice?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, very. So...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Let's keep trying our best together.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sorry?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Mm... It may be boring, but I realized that we should start with the
basics!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're a squad, so we ought to hear each other out and show more
appreciation for each other. Because at the end of the day...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
People don't team up by deciding to follow one person, but by
wanting to build something together.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Heh... Hehehe! I see. So this is a little token of your
appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, you're so awkward—and way too serious. This is like a scene
from a drama. The classic coworkers bonding over a coffee on the
roof.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... yeah, you're right. Let's do our best to create something that'll
inspire all our friends in the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Pah, you got me sounding all corny too. I'm way out of my depth
here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I appreciate it all the same. So, here. Will you accept this?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Hehe. Red bean soup, though? That's an interesting
choice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's wrong with it?! Of all the drinks in the vending machine,
this one looked like it'd warm you up the most!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all for today. I feel I got some hints from speaking with you
all.

text_block_list.name: Tofu Maker
text_block_list.text:
Oh, glad to hear it! Good luck, cheer captain! Oh yeah, if you need
any more help...

text_block_list.name: Tofu Maker
text_block_list.text:
You should try speaking with last year's leader, Bamboo. She did a
fantastic job!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right! Seeking guidance from last year's leader is a great
idea! I'll ask Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: King and Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, Bamboo?!
